## Pull Request

**Type:** <!-- feat | fix | refactor | test | docs | chore | ci -->

**Description:** <!-- What does this PR do? Why? How? -->

**Screenshots / recordings:** <!-- Required for UI changes -->

**Related issue:** <!-- Closes #X or Ref #X -->

---

### Checklist

- [ ] CI is green (analyze + test + all builds pass)
- [ ] New code has been reviewed
- [ ] Edge cases handled (loading, empty, error, offline)
- [ ] No P0 bugs introduced
- [ ] Telemetry / analytics event added for new interactions
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
- [ ] Regression: existing features in the same area still work

---

### Notes for reviewers

<!-- Any context the reviewer needs: edge cases, testing done, dependency on other PRs -->
